overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a dirt trail through a sunlit grassy meadow with scattered trees and distant mountains. The character encounters horse riders and a covered wagon while approaching a railway crossing with a wooden signpost.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through a sunlit meadow scattered with oak trees. A horse rider passes by from right to left at a trot. The rocky mountain peak looms in the distant center background while tall grass lines both sides of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail approaching road crossing

events.description: second horse rider passes by on the trail from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the landscape opens up

notable_agents.action: second rider on horseback passing by on the trail

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts marking property boundary

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the open grassland as the trail curves gently. A second horse rider passes by in the same direction as the first. Wooden fence posts appear in the distance on the left, and the mountain formation shifts toward the right side of the frame.

events.description: covered wagon passes by on the adjacent paved road
passing wooden signpost marking Emerald Ranch and Valentine directions
trail now runs parallel to railway tracks

agents.ego_description: walking past the signpost and continuing alongside the railway

notable_agents.action: covered wagon being pulled by horses along the adjacent road

entered.detail: wider paved road running perpendicular to the trail
weathered wooden sign with directions to Emerald Ranch and Valentine
metal railway tracks running parallel to the dirt trail
wooden telegraph pole alongside the railway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a trail intersection where a covered wagon passes on the adjacent paved road. The character walks past a weathered wooden signpost indicating directions to Emerald Ranch and Valentine, then continues along the trail as it runs parallel to railway tracks. The mountain formation now appears on the left side as the path curves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from an open, sunlit meadow into a structured rural intersection. It begins with the character walking through tall grass and oak trees as a horse rider trots past, with a rocky mountain peak looming in the distant center. As the trail curves gently, a second rider passes by and the mountain formation shifts toward the right while wooden fence posts emerge on the left. The scene then opens into a trail intersection where a covered wagon passes on an adjacent paved road, leading the character past a weathered wooden signpost pointing toward Emerald Ranch and Valentine. Finally, the path curves again to run parallel to railway tracks, shifting the distant mountains back toward the left side of the frame.
